title: Grok AI $40K Bitcoin Price Prediction: Why Analysts Say It’s Too Bearish
description: Bitcoin crashed to nearly $60,000 in early February before bouncing back to around $67,000. Most analysts think the worst is over, but Grok sees more downside ahead. The Elon Musk AI forecasts a BTC price as low as $40,000—a level Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) hasn’t touched since early 2024. A drop to $40,000 would mark a ...
